title: Saro´s Slopes
description: Convert any full block into a smooth slope with adjustable height using the Slopes Tool — for terrain grading and architecture.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Slopes/MP_SAROS_SLOPES_Header.webp)

![Over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Slopes/MP_SAROS_SLOPES_Description.webp)
The **Saros' Slopes Mod** introduces a revolutionary system that allows players to create custom slope blocks in Minecraft. Transform any full block into a slope with adjustable heights, perfect for creating smooth terrain transitions, architectural details, and creative builds!

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Slopes/MP_SAROS_SLOPES_Features.webp)
- **Custom Slope Blocks** 🔺
    - Convert any full block into a slope block with adjustable heights from 1 to 15 steps.
    - Slopes retain the original block's texture, color, and biome-dependent tinting.

- **Easy-to-Use Tool** 🛠️
    - Use the Slopes Tool to convert blocks and adjust slope heights with simple clicks.
    - Right-click to decrease height.

- **Smart Block Detection** 🧠
    - Only full blocks can be converted to slopes - plants, torches, and other non-full blocks are automatically excluded.

- **Realistic Rendering** ✨
    - Slopes feature proper lighting, directional shading, and biome-dependent colors.

![How to Use](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Slopes/MP_SAROS_SLOPES_How.webp)
1. **Craft the Slopes Tool**: Create the Slopes Tool item in your crafting table.
2. **Convert a Block**: Right-click any full block with the Slopes Tool to convert it into a slope.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4sGqVRMBvXM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Slopes/MP_SAROS_SLOPES_Supported_versions.webp)

### Currently Supported

- **Forge 1.21.1** ✅
- **Forge 1.20.1** ✅
